title: Bridge Essay: The Predictive Coding Account of Psychosis.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Dependent arising — predictive processing, free energy principle, active inference as causal cognition.

**The Predictive Coding Account of Psychosis.**. Biol Psychiatry.. PMID: 30007575. DOI: 10.1016/j.biopsych.2018.05.015. Fueled by developments in computational neuroscience, there has been increasing interest in the underlying neurocomputational mechanisms of psychosis. One successful approach involves predictive coding and Bayesian inference. Here, inferences regarding the current state of the world are made by combining prior beliefs with incoming sensory signals.
